name: Calamari Marinara
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
2. Add the minced garlic and chopped onions to the hot oil. Sauté until the onions are slightly browned, about 5 minutes.
3. Stir in the chopped parsley and fresh basil.
4. Add the squid slices, white wine, clam juice, marinara sauce, oregano, salt, pepper, and crushed red pepper flakes.
5. Cook, stirring occasionally, until the squid is tender, about 8-10 minutes.
6. Serve hot with pasta or over steamed vegetables.
